title: Microstate Visualizer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive particle distribution showing microstate counts, probabilities, and entropy as particles occupy two halves of a container.

learningObjectives: Relate the number of microstates to macrostate probability and entropy.
Explain how removing constraints increases W and S.

keyQuestions: Why is the 50:50 macrostate the most probable for large N?
How does removing a constraint change W?
commonMisconceptions: Entropy is just disorder without quantitative meaning
assessmentOpportunities: Students record W and S for selected N values
Learners explain the effect of removing the wall
